title: Building Interactive UIs in VS Code with MCP Apps — Marlene Mhangami & Liam Hampton, GitHub
summary: MCP tools can return data alongside HTML UI resources that render as sandboxed iframes directly in VS Code chat windows. The pattern enables live, interactive components like flame graphs and Excalidraw diagrams that call back to the server for fresh data without exposing local settings or APIs.
